message:
feat(core): implement VACUUM INTO, window aggregate functions, and SELECT fixture expansion

Connection layer:
- Implement VACUUM INTO via copy_database_to() across all pager backends
  (memory, io_uring, unix, windows), replacing the previous not-implemented stub
- Move VACUUM statement dispatch out of autocommit read transaction since
  it needs pager quiescence

Window functions:
- Add group_concat() and string_agg() as window-compatible aggregate functions
  with proper step/value/inverse/finalize lifecycle
- Register both functions in the window function dispatch table

VDBE:
- Extend OP_AggStep and OP_AggFinal to handle window aggregate variants
- Add group_concat window function integration in the bytecode interpreter

Types/Cx:
- Improve cfg(test) scanning to handle multi-line attribute blocks, test
  functions (fn test_*), and items beyond just modules — reduces false
  positives in production code analysis

E2E & conformance:
- Expand SELECT fixture suite with additional query patterns
- Update realdb E2E binary with broader test coverage
- Add oracle conformance test cases for new window function behavior

Parser:
- Minor extension to support VACUUM INTO syntax in the SQL parser

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
